criteria_results.criterion: has_role option visually disabled with '(coming soon)' text in coloring panel criteria_type select
criteria_results.evidence: coloring-panel.tsx line 24 still reads `{ value: 'has_role', label: 'Has Role' }` with no `disabled` field. CRITERIA_OPTIONS type is `{ value: CriteriaType; label: string }[]` — no disabled property. BUILD_RESULT_2.json claims status='completed' and staged_files=['src/components/canvas/coloring-panel.tsx'], but NO 'builder slot 2 iteration 44' commit exists in git log. The BUG-020 changes were never committed or merged into the session branch.

criteria_results.criterion: If existing rules use has_role, show subtle warning 'Not yet evaluated on canvas' below criteria row
criteria_results.evidence: Display mode section (lines 239–283) contains no conditional warning for criteria_type === 'has_role'. Changes not present in working tree.

criteria_results.criterion: Both <select> elements (Add form + Edit form) pass disabled={opt.disabled} to <option> for has_role
criteria_results.evidence: Add form select (lines 317–329) and edit form select (lines 196–208) render `<option key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>{opt.label}</option>` with no disabled attribute. No disabled field in CRITERIA_OPTIONS.

criteria_results.criterion: Other 5 criteria types remain fully functional and unaffected
criteria_results.evidence: Cannot assess — build was not merged. Pre-existing criteria types are unmodified (no regression introduced), but the required BUG-020 changes are absent.

criteria_results.criterion: Duplicate Workspace button triggers Radix UI Dialog instead of window.confirm()
criteria_results.evidence: settings/page.tsx line 247: `<Button variant='outline' onClick={() => setConfirmCloneOpen(true)} loading={cloning}>`. Dialog controlled by `confirmCloneOpen` useState boolean (line 41). handleClone at line 142 no longer calls window.confirm() — first action is `setConfirmCloneOpen(false)`.

criteria_results.criterion: Dialog title: 'Duplicate Workspace'
criteria_results.evidence: settings/page.tsx line 271: `<DialogTitle>Duplicate Workspace</DialogTitle>`

criteria_results.criterion: Dialog description: 'A full copy will be created with all canvas data — tabs, sections, steps, connections, teams, roles, people, and tools.'
criteria_results.evidence: settings/page.tsx lines 272–274: `<DialogDescription>A full copy will be created with all canvas data — tabs, sections, steps, connections, teams, roles, people, and tools.</DialogDescription>` — exact match.

criteria_results.criterion: Cancel button (secondary variant) and Duplicate button (default variant)
criteria_results.evidence: settings/page.tsx line 277: `<Button variant='secondary' onClick={() => setConfirmCloneOpen(false)}>Cancel</Button>`. Line 280: `<Button onClick={handleClone}>Duplicate</Button>` — default variant (no variant prop = default).

criteria_results.criterion: Clicking Duplicate triggers existing clone logic with loading state
criteria_results.evidence: handleClone (line 142) calls setConfirmCloneOpen(false) then setCloning(true), calls cloneWorkspace(), cloning state feeds loading={cloning} on the trigger button (line 247). Loading state wired correctly.

criteria_results.criterion: Clicking Cancel or Escape closes dialog without action
criteria_results.evidence: Dialog has onOpenChange={setConfirmCloneOpen} (line 268) which handles Escape key. Cancel button explicitly calls setConfirmCloneOpen(false). Neither invokes handleClone.

criteria_results.criterion: Zero window.confirm() calls remain in settings/page.tsx for clone
criteria_results.evidence: handleClone (line 142) contains no window.confirm(). The only remaining confirm() is handleDelete (line 157) which is explicitly out of scope per special_instructions.

criteria_results.criterion: Migration 020_section_templates.sql creates templates table with correct schema
criteria_results.evidence: Read via `git show HEAD:autonomous-dev/.ralph/worktrees/build-1/supabase/migrations/020_section_templates.sql`. Table has: id UUID PK default uuid_generate_v4(), workspace_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, category TEXT, template_data JSONB NOT NULL, created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(). All fields match spec.

criteria_results.criterion: RLS policies using can_access_workspace(workspace_id) for SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
criteria_results.evidence: Migration creates 4 policies: templates_select (USING), templates_insert (WITH CHECK), templates_update (USING), templates_delete (USING) — all using can_access_workspace(workspace_id). ALTER TABLE templates ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY present.

criteria_results.criterion: update_updated_at trigger on templates table
criteria_results.evidence: Migration: `CREATE TRIGGER templates_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON templates FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();`

criteria_results.criterion: Index on (workspace_id)
criteria_results.evidence: Migration: `CREATE INDEX idx_templates_workspace ON templates(workspace_id);`

criteria_results.criterion: Template interface added to src/types/database.ts with matching fields
criteria_results.evidence: database.ts (from git) exports: TemplateSectionData, TemplateStepData, TemplateConnectionData, TemplateStepRoleData, TemplateData, Template interfaces. Template interface has id, workspace_id, name, description, category, template_data, created_by, created_at, updated_at. Types align with DB schema.

criteria_results.criterion: GET /api/v1/templates?workspace_id=X — auth check, returns Template[]
criteria_results.evidence: GET handler: auth check (401 if no user), workspace_id validation (400 if missing), Supabase query with .eq('workspace_id', workspaceId).order('created_at'). Returns successResponse(templates). Pattern matches spec.

criteria_results.criterion: POST /api/v1/templates — fetches section+steps+connections+step_roles, builds JSONB snapshot, returns 201
criteria_results.evidence: POST route (partially verified) validates workspace_id and section_id, returns successResponse. BUILD_RESULT notes confirm: 'snapshots section+steps+connections+step_roles into template_data JSONB'. TypeScript compiles (BUILD_RESULT verification: pass, 0 errors).

criteria_results.criterion: DELETE /api/v1/templates/[id] — auth check, delete, return success
criteria_results.evidence: DELETE handler: auth check, deletes by id with .delete().eq('id', id).select().single(), handles PGRST116 as 404. Calls void logActivity on successful delete. Returns successResponse({ deleted: true }).

criteria_results.criterion: POST /api/v1/templates/[id]/deploy — creates section+steps+connections with new UUIDs, remaps via stepIdMap
criteria_results.evidence: Deploy route: fetches template (RLS), fetches tab for workspace_id, inserts new section at position_x/position_y, builds stepIdMap<string,string> for UUID remapping, iterates templateData.steps creating new steps. Pattern matches spec requirement. Full route partially verified via git show.

criteria_results.criterion: Client wrappers: fetchTemplates, createTemplateFromSection, deployTemplate, deleteTemplate
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_1.json notes: '4 STARTER_TEMPLATES defined with 5 steps each. Client wrappers: fetchTemplates, createTemplateFromSection, deployTemplate, deleteTemplate.' src/lib/api/client.ts modified (42 lines added). TypeScript compiles with 0 errors confirms function signatures are valid.

criteria_results.criterion: STARTER_TEMPLATES: 4 templates (Customer Onboarding, Support Ticket, Content Creation, Lead Nurturing), each 5 steps
criteria_results.evidence: templates.ts (from git): STARTER_TEMPLATES array with 4 entries. Customer Onboarding (5 steps), Support Ticket (5 steps), Content Creation (5 steps), Lead Nurturing (5 steps). makeSteps() helper generates positioning. All have connections:[], step_roles:[].

criteria_results.criterion: void logActivity() on template create, deploy, and delete
criteria_results.evidence: Delete route confirmed: `void logActivity({...action: 'deleted', entity_type: 'templates'...})`. Deploy route imports logActivity. BUILD_RESULT notes confirm activity logging on all three operations. TypeScript compiles = void prefix correct.

criteria_results.criterion: npx tsc --noEmit passes
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_1.json verification.typecheck: { status: 'pass', errors: 0, output: 'npx tsc --noEmit exited 0, no output' }

quality_gate.notes: No live browser testing performed. Dev server running (localhost:3000 returns 307) but no test credentials available in .env.local. IMP-028 and BUG-020 acceptance criteria verified via static source analysis. BUG-020 changes absent from working tree; FEAT-052 files committed to worktree paths in git but not to src/.

bugs_found.description: BUG-020 build output was NOT committed or merged into the session branch. BUILD_RESULT_2.json reports status='completed' with staged_files=['src/components/canvas/coloring-panel.tsx'], but git log shows no 'builder slot 2 iteration 44' commit and no 'merge builder slot 2 for iteration 44' commit. The coloring-panel.tsx in the working tree is identical to the pre-iteration state — `has_role` is not disabled, no '(coming soon)' label, no warning text for has_role rules.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Read src/components/canvas/coloring-panel.tsx line 18-26 — CRITERIA_OPTIONS has no disabled field. 2. Check `git log --oneline -20` — no 'slot 2 iteration 44' commits. 3. Open coloring panel on canvas — has_role is selectable.

bugs_found.description: FEAT-052 API routes committed to worktree paths (autonomous-dev/.ralph/worktrees/build-1/src/...) in git, not to the expected src/ paths. `src/app/api/v1/templates/` does not exist in the working tree. The builder used `git add -f` for worktree-relative paths, bypassing the G015 fix (git add src/ supabase/). A 'merge builder slot 1 for iteration 44' commit is also absent from the git log. The templates API endpoints are not accessible at runtime.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. `ls src/app/api/v1/templates/` — returns empty/not found. 2. `git log --oneline -10` — no 'merge builder slot 1 iteration 44'. 3. `git status` — shows D autonomous-dev/.ralph/worktrees/build-1/src/... (worktree paths, not src/ paths).

improvements_found.observation: FEAT-052 TemplateConnectionData uses {source_step_id, target_step_id} (UUIDs) instead of {source_step_index, target_step_index} (array indices) as specified in the PRD's special_instructions. The deploy route maps via stepIdMap<oldId, newId>, which requires source sections to store step IDs in template_data. STARTER_TEMPLATES have empty connections so no impact today, but the stored template_data format differs from PRD spec.
improvements_found.design_principle: PRD spec fidelity — special_instructions explicitly stated index-based connections for portability
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Either update TemplateConnectionData to use source_step_index/target_step_index numbers (align with spec), or update the special_instructions in the PRD to reflect the UUID-based approach chosen. The UUID approach is functionally valid for workspace-scoped templates.

improvements_found.observation: FEAT-052 TemplateStepData field names differ from PRD spec: uses `notes` (not `description`), `frequency_per_month` (not `frequency`), `maturity_score` (not `maturity_current`), `target_maturity` (not `maturity_target`). `cost_per_execution` from spec is absent. These are schema-level deviations that may affect future UI integration for #FEAT-053 (UI layer).
improvements_found.design_principle: Consistency with PRD specification — the next task (#FEAT-053) will rely on this schema
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Before building the FEAT-053 UI layer, align TemplateStepData field names with the PRD spec (description, frequency, maturity_current, maturity_target, cost_per_execution) or update the PRD to match the implemented schema.

improvements_found.observation: IMP-028 settings page: The Duplicate Workspace section description (line 245) still says 'Create a full copy of this workspace, including all tabs, sections, steps, and connections' (the old incomplete text). The Dialog description correctly lists all entity types, but the page body text is not updated to match. Minor inconsistency between the pre-dialog description and the dialog's accurate description.
improvements_found.design_principle: Consistency and standards — body description should match dialog description
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Update the paragraph at line 245-246 to match the dialog description: 'Create a full copy of this workspace with all canvas data — tabs, sections, steps, connections, teams, roles, people, and tools.'
